name: My Sticker Zoo
short_description: My Sticker Zoo is a relaxing strategy and puzzle game where you build your own zoo. Construct impressive habitats for your sticker animals by placing tiles. Manage a variety of wildlife parks as you unlock new scenario's. Collect all the stars, set new high-scores and become an expert ranger!
detailed_description:
My Sticker Zoo is a relaxing building strategy and puzzle game in which you place tiles to create a zoo for your own sticker animals. With My Sticker Zoo you can build your dream zoo, or complete specific set challenge levels. Strategically place your tiles, make large habitats and score as many points as possible.

In My Sticker Zoo you start with 5 path tiles to create the entrance of your zoo. One after the other, you choose card packs, that include paths, buildings, habitats and enrichments. Place the tiles that you unpack and create your ideal zoo, earning points along the way by completing habitats, working around building mechanics and giving your sticker animals their own cozy habitat.

If you are looking for more of a challenge than just sandbox, don't worry. With our scenario levels you are challenged to complete score goals with modified rules, intricate maps and puzzling levels.

What My Sticker Zoo offers

  • Building your own tile-based zoo

  • Mix of strategy and puzzle mechanics

  • Relaxing and calming gameplay

  • Cute sticker animals and sticker buildings

  • High replay value

  • 32 Scenario levels

  • A game with a board game feel
